title: DeploymentStatusPayload v1
description: Runner-reported observed state of a deployment; published to arx.{tenant}.deployment_status.{runner_id}.{spec_id} inside a NatsEnvelope. Sourced from docs/domain.md line 106 (DeploymentStatus BC).

spec_id.description: Deployment spec identifier this status references.

container_id.description: Local container / process identifier the runner assigned to the deployment.

phase.description: Coarse-grained phase (docs/domain.md §DeploymentStatus). `error` is reported via `health.status = "error"` while phase stays at the last observable coarse state; a stopped-with-error is `phase = stopped` + `health.reason`.

observed_generation.description: Monotonic generation counter from the DeploymentSpec; MUST NOT decrease across successive statuses for the same spec_id.

health.description: Fine-grained health signal — carried separately from phase so a runner can be `phase=running` + `health.status=warning`.

reason.description: Free-form english reason string; safe to expose to the operator UI.

started_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the last successful start; absent while phase == pending.

stopped_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the last transition to phase == stopped; absent while running.

last_reconcile_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp of the last reconcile-loop iteration that observed this deployment.

reported_by_runner_id.description: Runner identity of the reporter; MUST equal the connected runner_id on arx side (tamper guard).

reported_at.description: RFC3339 UTC timestamp when the runner emitted the status.
